series_metadata.series_description: The board meeting packets consist of information sent to the Board prior to each board meeting for review. The packets include; (agenda, copies of slides to be reviewed during the meeting, media information). These packets are retained separate from the board meeting minutes which captures the outcome of each board meeting. (See Board Minutes Schedule OCC-RPM-09)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper copy of Board Packets are scanned into OCC electronic system and ; Electronic: Board Packets are maintained in OCC electronic data base no longer of administrative value
